description: The largest island in West Lake, concentrated with historical and cultural attractions, offering a tranquil environment.
A famous ancient Buddhist temple in China, with a history of approximately 1,700 years, known for its thriving incense offerings and magnificent architecture.
A Zen-inspired ancient temple nestled among tea plantations and bamboo forests, featuring a serene and elegant environment, ideal for meditation and relaxation.
A scenic avenue on the west side of West Lake, quieter compared to Su Causeway, perfect for leisurely strolls.

attraction_name: Hangzhou Hubin Intime in77 Area A
description: A well-known shopping center in Hangzhou, located by West Lake, offering a wide range of brands and convenient transportation.
An important natural science museum in East China, showcasing a rich collection of exhibits.
One of the New Ten Scenes of West Lake, where nine streams converge, with particularly enchanting autumn scenery.
A reconstructed ancient pagoda with a history of a thousand years, offering panoramic views of West Lake from the top, closely associated with the legend of 'The Legend of the White Snake.'
Showcasing traditional handicrafts and modern arts of Hangzhou, including silk, embroidery, carving, and various other craft categories.
The most famous of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a causeway built under the supervision of Su Dongpo, renowned for its willow-lined beauty in spring.
A unique peak in front of Lingyin Temple, featuring abundant stone carvings and distinctive geological landscapes.
A well-preserved historic district with typical Jiangnan water town architecture, exuding a strong sense of local life.

attraction_name: Autumn Moon Over the Calm Lake Scenic Spot
description: One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a serene and beautiful spot for moon viewing and lake gazing.
A UNESCO World Heritage Site and China's most famous lake destination, renowned for its 'One Lake, Two Pagodas, Three Causeways, and Ten Scenes.'
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a garden famous for its red koi fish, particularly stunning during the blooming season in spring.
A large-scale live-action performance blending Hangzhou's culture with modern art, staged at night on West Lake.
China's first national wetland park, featuring a beautiful ecological environment and a filming location for the movie 'If You Are the One.'
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, located on the island of Xiaoyingzhou, named for the reflection of three stone pagodas resembling moons.
